current_html:
§ 180.530 Where can I find SAM.gov Exclusions?

You may access SAM.gov Exclusions through the internet, currently at https://www.sam.gov.
proposed_html:
§ 180.530
Where can I find SAM.gov Exclusions?

You may access SAM.gov Exclusions through the internet, currently at SAM.gov .
